feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Object SFPF(Adobe Form) is not allowed in ABAP Cloud Development. What's the alternate of it?
entry.content:
I encounter a message while trying run ATC check with 'ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS' that neither Adobe Form nor Smartforms are allowed in ABAP Cloud Development.

I would like to know what's the alternate of forms in ABAP Clean Core approach.

entry.title: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi,

As I have different allocation portions between Local and group GAAP, I need to make distribution and assessment to general ledger level. I found a solution with transactions FAGLGA11 & FAGLGA31 but I read that those transactions are going to be deprecated in the SAP S/4HANA latest versions. Does anyone know how can I do it with new transactions? I have tried with KSV1 & KSU1 but I can not choose the ledger so they are not useful for me. 

Regards,
Ale.

entry.title: Effect of changing password for job user?
entry.content:
Dear Experts!

I would like to confirm one thing regarding the users we use for executing jobs on SAP private cloud system.

Due to password policy change, I will have to update password for users currently used for executing jobs. I am concerned about the effect it might have on job execution after updating the password.

Would it cause any issues like job cancellation or error if I change the password? All of the users are system users.

Additionally, there is a user named "BATCH_USER" in our system that is also responsible for execution of some jobs but I am not able to see the user in SU10. Is it a special user that does not require password change?

thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Extension while delivery creation to change item weights and dimensions before route determination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are using S/4HANA and have to change weights and dimensions for our configured products on item level while creating deliveries. As different weights may impact route determination, we cannot use most common user exits (Include MV50AFZ1 or BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC) because route has already been determinated when processing them.

Therefore we need an extension where to change item data BEFORE route is determined.

Can anyone help?

Kind regards
Peter Schmidt

entry.title: Hyperscaler / ECS BACKUP SOLUTION / COHESITY
entry.content:
Hello,

according to the SAP_Enterprise_Cloud_Services_Backups.pdf guide, the backup files (full and log) are moved from the source server to the hyperscaler storage in Azure, for example.
How long does the data remain on the source server and at what frequency is the data moved to the hyperscaler storage and transferred to Cohesity?

THX

entry.title: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Looking for a way to consume custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-Premise in BTP ABAP Environment using Event Consumption Model.

1. Creating custom RAP events

2. Event consumption model for standard S/4HANA events using AsyncAPI on BTP ABAP environment - Step 4 onwards. AsyncAPI/Event metadata for released events can be downloaded from api.sap.com

My question is how can I generate the event metadata/AsyncAPI file for custom RAP events in S/4HANA Private Cloud to be able to use the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. I know it is possible to generate the event metadata for RAP events in S/4HANA Public Cloud - Steps 1 to 3, but is this possible on Private cloud. If not how can we consume custom RAP events from private cloud in SAP BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Creating and triggering non-RAP custom events from S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create and trigger non-RAP custom enterprise events from S/4HANA Private Cloud preferably through ABAP? If so, how can it be achieved and can we generate an event metadata/AsyncAPI file for such custom events for use in Event Consumption Model on BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: 如何实现销售出库交货单过账后按行项目冲销
entry.content: 当前，我们只能用vl09对整张销售出库交货单进行冲销，但是因为一些原因，我们希望能够实现销售出库交货单过账后能够按行项目进行冲销。请问如何实现？

entry.title: [COF]SAP systems deployed in different subnets
entry.content:
Hi,

There is a question in the COF below. Could you please explain specifically what it means?

Why do you ask whether to deploy systems on different subnets?

Do you want to have your SAP systems deployed in different subnets? If yes, your CAA will get in touch with you to work out the details

Best regards,

Arakawa

entry.title: Rental server for SAP S/4HANA Cloud version up
entry.content:
I would like to rent two sandbox servers to verify the upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for the S/4HANA upgrade project.
Is it possible to rent multiple servers as follows?
1. Rent server A for six months.
On server A, copy the system from the production system and perform the S/4HANA upgrade.
2. Rent server B for five months, starting from the month following the rental period of server A.
As with server A, copy the system from the production system and upgrade S/4HANA.

entry.title: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app generation broken for RAP-based OData V4 service
entry.content:
Hi,

Environment details:

Backend - SAP S4HANA 2022 FPS02

SAP Business Application Studio Version: 1.93.1
UI5 Version 1.108.30

I am encountering a strange issue in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) while generating a Fiori List Report for a RAP-based OData V4 service. Despite the service being explicitly defined and recognized as OData V4, BAS/Fiori Tools incorrectly treat it as an OData V2 service and generate faulty configurations.

This issue affects all my previously deployed V4 services, which worked successfully earlier. However, when redeploying these services as duplicate apps for testing, BAS incorrectly interprets them as V2 services. As a result, the generated application is broken and fails to function both during preview in BAS and after deployment.

The app fails to load with the following errors:
"[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed"

"Invalid metadata document."

It is important to note that the same application and service work perfectly fine when previewed locally through Eclipse, which confirms that both the app and the generated OData V4 service, metadata are correct. 

Is anyone else facing a similar problem? App generation and deployment has worked absolutely fine in the past with the exact same steps.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Customer Onboarding Form (COF) and procedures for building additional environments
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Currently, the customer is using S/4HANA in 3 landscapes at RISE.

In order to upgrade S/4HANA, they will be contracting for an additional sandbox S/4HANA environment.
For this reason, the CR procedure is being carried out with TVRF.
Is a COF required when contracting for this additional environment?

The COF includes network information and even WebDispatcher, but this time they are planning to prepare a sandbox environment for S/4HANA and copy the system from the existing environment.
Please tell me the procedure for adding a sandbox environment to an existing landscape.

entry.title: The re-use of current Contents server which connect to PCE Rise
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

The customer who is currently using the content server and they plan to move PCE Environment. I have questions during Architecting.

1. Can't not re-use current Contents server which connect to New S4 Server in Rise ?

2. The contents server was free before the PCE. Should customer have to buy new contents server  If we can't reuse current one?

3. Pls, let me know the strategy of Contents server in terms of SAP products. Someone told me that SAP Strategy is that the contents server must move to BTP DMS. 

 

Thanks in advance.

BR Chang

entry.title: CDS View with aggregation
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if what I want to do is possible in CDS views without doing ABAP.

Is it possible to create a custom CDS view that have aggregation (sum of stock) already calculated in it. The goal would be to join this view to another one with aggregation.

We would like to do a report with available and reserved stock group by Material/Plant/Storage Location (basically MB52 with reserved)

First try, I create a Custom view on I_MATERIALSTOCK_2 with Material/Plant/Storage as Key and configured the Stock as sum with Element Properties.
Then, I create another custom view with I_ReservationDocumentItem similarly.
Then, I join those two view on the keys Material/Plant/Storage and create an analytical query on this view. This gives wrong values because each stock is multiplied by the number of lines from the other view.

Second try, I wanted to join the C_MaterialStockActual view to I_ReservationDocumentItem. But this fails as I cannot use C_MaterialStockActual in another CDS View.

Any guidance or feedback is appreciated.

Julien

entry.title: SAP SAM4U Solution | License Reporting
entry.content:
Dear All,

SAM4U Introduction- 

SAP’s software asset manager tool SAM4U is a tailored solution that allows customers to analyze their license consumption compared to SAP license entitlement. It consolidates usage data from customers’ systems and considers data such as SAP user authorizations, SAP users' active use footprints, and information about developer users.

This can be implemented in any SAP S4HANA foundation platform. 

TCI package can be refereed from KBA# 3292019 - SAM4U Data Extractor 

 

Details Steps: 

Implementation Steps-

  1. Implement TCI note 3298562 implementations.
  2. Implement SAP notes 2706317 and 3292019

Post installation steps-

    • Create SAM4U Variant for ABAP Report /SAM4U/BTL_START_URL
    • Activate sicf service /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sam4u/dashbrd/
    • Activate and Maintain Services odata service /SAM4U/BTL_CLIENT
    • Execute test Odata service
    • Create RFC Connection for Definition for Daemon Registration
    • Execute the program /SAM4U/BTL_DAEMON_MANAGER for Daemon Registration.
    • Daemon Registration for Auto Start Up

Backend system configuration-

  1. Configure RFC connection of type 3 to your SAP systems. 
  2. Create RFC user with access to execute "/SAM4U/BEX_ACTIVE_USE_ANALYSIS" along with S_TOOLS_EX authorization. 
  3. Obtain recent Authorization rule set by following note 3113382(check administration section of the guide for more detials "User Guide - SAM4U Tool-V2-L"
  4. Start SAM4U Fiori Application

We can analyze consolidated license consumption data from various SAP backend systems and compare it with current licensing information using one of the following methods:

  1. SAP users’ authorizations
  2. SAP active usage of the systems
  3. SAP manual users’ classification
  4. SAP Engines usage
  5. SAP HANA EE usage

entry.title: How to question on Cloud Architecture Q&A
entry.content:
Dear Team, The Partner would like to register a new question on Cloud Architecture Q&A. But the partner could not do it.
Could you please show me how to question on on Cloud Architecture Q&A?

>SAP Community ->Partner Groups  ->ERP and Finance  ->SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition  ->Cloud Architecture  ->Cloud Architecture Q&A

Thank you and best regards,
Kenichi Yanou, Partner Business Manager

entry.title: Does AIF support batch OData configuration? (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER)
entry.content:
Does AIF support batch OData configurations? We are currently using the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER, and our middleware team is sending a batch POST call (comprising multiple POST requests) to create multiple Business Partners in the S/4HANA system.

Can we use AIF to validate the data before it is posted? Since AIF is generally designed to process one JSON file per call, how can it be set up to handle a batch request? Is there a way to configure AIF to support such batch processing?

entry.title: Reducing the VM size of HANA in Rise PCE
entry.content:
In Rise PCE, if the size of the HANA DB used in S/4HANA becomes smaller than expected,
is it possible to reduce the VM size?
If so, what contract procedures should I follow?

entry.title: Excess Component consumption Fiori App notification
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need the send notification to user about excess component consumption in certain process order or in Certain period. how i can acheive this using Excess Component Consumption App or eitherwise ?

entry.title: SAP RAP: Event on click of custom action with parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

I've an unmanaged RAP app with a custom action with parameter. 

 

action ( features : instance ) start_stock_transfer parameter YSD_D_StockTrfDetails;

 

This works fine - When the action is executed, a popup is displayed for parameter input and then the relevant method is called on save for the action.

Requirement: I want to capture the event on click of the action before the popup for parameter input is displayed and handle it in a method to execute some custom code.

User clicks on start stock transfer --> Some event( to execute custom ABAP code ) --> parameter popup is displayed --> save --> normal execution flow.

Is this achievable on SAP S/4HANA private cloud 2022?

Edit: Business Requirement:

The warehouse team will start a stock transfer process using a custom action. The business wants to measure the time taken from the start of the action to the actual save after entering all the required parameters and the trigger of actual stock transfer on save.

Best Regards,

Saurabh
